raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-reminder to maintain a cosmological perspective that frames personal action as aligned with universal nature",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the universe possesses an intelligible nature or order",
    "the individual is a constituent part of that order with a definable relation to it",
    "external obstacles cannot prevent speech or action congruent with that order",
    "keeping this perspective in mind is necessary or beneficial for right conduct"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a Stoic framework that equates freedom with alignment to cosmic nature, though the claims rest on metaphysical assumptions rather than empirical derivation",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the user experiences reduced distress or improved acceptance when adopting a deterministic, part-whole cosmology; the statement functions as a cognitive anchor that promotes values-congruent behavior without denying observable constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the cosmology is treated as literally true rather than as a heuristic; external barriers are denied rather than accepted; the statement fosters fatalism or suppression of legitimate agency"
}
